titleStmt.title: SII 22.359: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 359. (A.R. No. 359 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶADĒVA—15th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 10 mā of land as kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadānam at Viśalūr in Aṇṇavāyil-kūṟṟam, after purchasing the same from the Ūrār of the place, by Nāchchi Malaiyāḻvi daughter (?) of Periyanāṭṭāchāriyaṉ of Tirukkoḍuṅguṉṟam to provide for the supply of 60 kalam of paddy every year at 6 kalam per mā of land, to the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu Iraṭṭapāṭikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṉṟicūḻnāṭṭut tirunalak kuṉṟattu tat tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟam Uṭai
yānāṉa periyanāṭṭācāriyaṉ makaḷ nāccimalaiyāḻviyeṉ Uṭai yār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkuk kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāy nāṉ kalveṭṭik kuṭutta paricāvatu nāṉ Iṉṉāṭṭu Aṇṇavāyil
kūṟṟattu vicalūr Ūrārpakkal vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyeṉāy Eṉṉutāṉa Alaivayalukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai kāṭaṉ kovintaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pāliyūraṉ ceykkum maṉattuḷāṭuvāṉ Aracu kovintaṉ paṉma
ṉuḷḷiṭṭār talaṅkaḷ Eriyāṉceykkum meṟkum tenpāṟkellai vicalūr menilakkuḷattukku nirpoṉavatikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cikkanallūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai muṟkoṭikaḷamānacey neṭumpāṭṭu
kkum Avani nārāyaṇa muventira coḻaveḷāṉ civaṉ puṉceykkut teṟkum Ākap perunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilattu naṉcai viḷainilam pattu māvukkum Iṉṉāyanāṟku Iṟaiy Iṟuttu keraḷāntakaṉ marakkālāl māttāl Aṟu
kalamāka vanta nellu Aḷakkakkaṭavārākavum Iṉṉellu Aḷakkumiṭattu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam Acal Iṟuttapaṭi Iṟukkakaṭaveṉākavum Antarāyam kiḻiṟai Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimaikaḷ Acal Iṟuttapaṭi Iṟukkakkaṭaveṉākavum Antarāya
m kiḻiṟai Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimaikaḷ tevatāṉam ceyyakkaṭaveṉākavum Innellu Iṭṭu Ikkoyilil Aḻakiyacemaṉ tiruveṭuttukkaṭṭi kaṭṭi Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Aḻivu certtu mikkutu śrī paṇṭāramāka Āvatāka
cammatittu kalveṭṭikkuṭutteṉ Ikkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉāṉa periya nāṭṭu Ācāriyaṉ makaḷ nāccimalaiyāḻviyeṉ Itu paṉmāhesurarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.359 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
